metaTitle: The Boeing Atmosphere Global Documentation Hub - Request a component

header.title: Request a component
header.description: Submit a request for a new component or changes related to the Figma library

sections.text:
Component feedback

Design feedback is vital to help grow the system based on user needs and product capabilities. Submit a component request with any component states or interaction needs you encounter.

  • Make sure to file a separate request for each component
  • Include any attachments or files in order to help bring context to your component request

Requesting a new component

Although Atmosphere has been designed for typical product functionalities, oftentimes new or unique interactions are needed to serve different users.

Identifying component modifications

Many components include different interaction states within the Figma library. However, there may be a need to represent more states. If you encounter a component issue, you may report a bug.

What to expect after submission

Our team will review each request and evaluate if the component can be applied to other products and use cases. We will contact you within 3 business days and develop a plan for a future release.

Component requests

To submit a new request, contact jurrien.vanberkum@boeing.com and make sure to include the following information and documentation:
items: Include your name, role and email
List topics or categories are related to your request
Describe the new component, its purpose and related use cases
Is this component new or modified?
What is the timing and level of urgency of your request?
sections.name: Jurriën Van Berkum
